title: Align configuration documentation with the CLI allowlist
task: README.md advertises one key that `seekforge config set` does not accept. Correct the documentation so the CLI list exactly reflects apps/cli/src/config.ts while retaining the separate Desktop capability statement. Do not change the CLI implementation or tests. Run npm test.

provenance.source: SeekForge 2026-07-22 feature audit: root README config-set capability drift

notes: A minimized real documentation/implementation drift found while dogfooding SeekForge.
